name: Satyr
description: A woodland spirit with a fondness for vineyards.
flavor: Very enthusiastic about grape quality. Questionably so.

name: Dryad
description: A tree nymph who nurtures orchards and herb gardens.
flavor: She does not appreciate when you call her a plant lady.

name: Pegasus
description: The winged horse. Does not pull plows. Has opinions about this.
flavor: Technically a liability. Aesthetically worth it.

name: Griffin
description: Half eagle, half lion, fully territorial about the estate.
flavor: Excellent guard animal. Zero liability waivers available.

name: Phoenix
description: A firebird of renewal. Excellent for morale, terrible for insurance.
flavor: Do not ask what happened to the last apiary.

name: Cerberus
description: Three-headed dog of Hades. Surprisingly good with children.
flavor: Needs three times the treats. Still worth it.
